en: Now Jesus was praying in a certain place, and when he finished, one of his disciples said to him, "Lord, teach us to pray, as John taught his disciples."
zh: 有一天，耶穌在一個地方祈禱，祈禱完了，有一個門徒對他說：“主啊，求你教導我們禱告，像約翰教導他的門徒一樣。”

en: And he said to them, "When you pray, say: "Father, hallowed be your name. Your kingdom come.
zh: 耶穌說：“你們禱告的時候，要說： ‘父啊，願你的名被尊為聖， 願你的國降臨 ；

en: Give us each day our daily bread,
zh: 我們需用的食物， 求你每天賜給我們；

en: and forgive us our sins, for we ourselves forgive everyone who is indebted to us. And lead us not into temptation."
zh: 赦免我們的罪， 因為我們也饒恕所有虧負我們的人； 不要讓我們陷入試探 。’”

en: And he said to them, "Which of you who has a friend will go to him at midnight and say to him, 'Friend, lend me three loaves,
zh: 耶穌又對他們說：“你們當中，誰有朋友半夜去找他，說：‘請你借給我三個餅，

en: for a friend of mine has arrived on a journey, and I have nothing to set before him';
zh: 因為我有一個朋友旅行來到我這裡，我沒有甚麼可以招待他。’

en: and he will answer from within, 'Do not bother me; the door is now shut, and my children are with me in bed. I cannot get up and give you anything'?
zh: 而他卻在裡面回答：‘不要麻煩我，門已經關好了，孩子也跟我在床上了，我不能起來拿給你。’

en: I tell you, though he will not get up and give him anything because he is his friend, yet because of his impudence he will rise and give him whatever he needs.
zh: 我告訴你們，即使不因為他是朋友而起來給他，也會因為他厚顏地直求，而起來照他所需要的給他。

en: And I tell you, ask, and it will be given to you; seek, and you will find; knock, and it will be opened to you.
zh: 我又告訴你們，你們祈求，就給你們；尋找，就尋見；叩門，就給你們開門。

en: For everyone who asks receives, and the one who seeks finds, and to the one who knocks it will be opened.
zh: 因為所有祈求的就得著，尋找的就尋見，叩門的就給他開門。

en: What father among you, if his son asks for a fish, will instead of a fish give him a serpent;
zh: 你們中間作父親的，哪有兒子求魚，反拿蛇當作魚給他呢？

en: or if he asks for an egg, will give him a scorpion?
zh: 或求雞蛋，反給他蠍子呢？

en: If you then, who are evil, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will the heavenly Father give the Holy Spirit to those who ask him!"
zh: 你們雖然不好，尚且知道把好東西給自己的兒女，何況天父，豈不更把聖靈賜給求他的人嗎？”

en: Now he was casting out a demon that was mute. When the demon had gone out, the mute man spoke, and the people marveled.
zh: 耶穌趕出一個啞巴鬼，鬼既出去，啞巴就說起話來，眾人都希奇。

en: But some of them said, "He casts out demons by Beelzebul, the prince of demons,"
zh: 有人說：“他靠鬼王別西卜趕鬼。”

en: while others, to test him, kept seeking from him a sign from heaven.
zh: 又有人試探他，向他求一個從天上來的神蹟。

en: But he, knowing their thoughts, said to them, "Every kingdom divided against itself is laid waste, and a divided household falls.
zh: 耶穌知道他們的心意，就對他們說：“如果一個國家自相紛爭，就必定荒涼；如果一個家庭自相為敵，就必然敗落。

en: And if Satan also is divided against himself, how will his kingdom stand? For you say that I cast out demons by Beelzebul.
zh: 如果撒但自相紛爭，他的國怎能站立得住呢？你們說我靠別西卜趕鬼，

en: And if I cast out demons by Beelzebul, by whom do your sons cast them out? Therefore they will be your judges.
zh: 我若靠別西卜趕鬼，你們的子孫趕鬼又靠誰呢？因此，他們必要作你們的審判官。

en: But if it is by the finger of God that I cast out demons, then the kingdom of God has come upon you.
zh: 我若靠 神的能力趕鬼，這就是 神的國臨到你們了。

en: When a strong man, fully armed, guards his own palace, his goods are safe;
zh: 一個壯漢拿著武器，看守自己的家園，他的家財就平安無事。

en: but when one stronger than he attacks him and overcomes him, he takes away his armor in which he trusted and divides his spoil.
zh: 但是一個比他更強的人來了，勝過了他，奪去他所倚靠的武器，就把他的家財當作掠物分了。

en: Whoever is not with me is against me, and whoever does not gather with me scatters.
zh: 不站在我這一邊的就是反對我的；不跟從一起收聚的就是分散的。

en: "When the unclean spirit has gone out of a person, it passes through waterless places seeking rest, and finding none it says, 'I will return to my house from which I came.'
zh: “一個污靈離開了一個人，走遍乾旱之地，尋找棲身的地方，卻沒有找到，就說：‘我要回到我從前離開了的那房子。’

en: And when it comes, it finds the house swept and put in order.
zh: 到了之後，看見裡面已經打掃乾淨，粉飾好了，

en: Then it goes and brings seven other spirits more evil than itself, and they enter and dwell there. And the last state of that person is worse than the first."
zh: 他就去帶了另外七個比自己更惡的污靈來，進去住在那裡；那人後來的情況，比以前更壞了。”

en: As he said these things, a woman in the crowd raised her voice and said to him, "Blessed is the womb that bore you, and the breasts at which you nursed!"
zh: 耶穌正說這些話的時候，群眾中有一個女人高聲對他說：“懷你胎的和哺養你的有福了！”

en: But he said, "Blessed rather are those who hear the word of God and keep it!"
zh: 他說：“是的，卻還不如聽 神的道而遵守的人有福。”

en: When the crowds were increasing, he began to say, "This generation is an evil generation. It seeks for a sign, but no sign will be given to it except the sign of Jonah.
zh: 眾人聚集的時候，耶穌就說：“這世代是個邪惡的世代。這世代尋求神蹟，可是除了約拿的神蹟以外，再沒有神蹟給他們了。

en: For as Jonah became a sign to the people of Nineveh, so will the Son of Man be to this generation.
zh: 約拿怎樣成了尼尼微人的神蹟，人子也照樣成為這個世代的神蹟。

en: The queen of the South will rise up at the judgment with the men of this generation and condemn them, for she came from the ends of the earth to hear the wisdom of Solomon, and behold, something greater than Solomon is here.
zh: 審判的時候，南方的女王要和這世代的人一同起來，她要定他們的罪，因為她從地極來到，要聽所羅門智慧的話。你看，這裡有一位是比所羅門更大的。

en: The men of Nineveh will rise up at the judgment with this generation and condemn it, for they repented at the preaching of Jonah, and behold, something greater than Jonah is here.
zh: 審判的時候，尼尼微人要和這世代的人一同起來，他們要定這個世代的罪，因為尼尼微人聽了約拿所傳的就悔改了。你看，這裡有一位是比約拿更大的。

en: "No one after lighting a lamp puts it in a cellar or under a basket, but on a stand, so that those who enter may see the light.
zh: “沒有人點了燈，把它放在地窖裡，或量器底下，卻放在燈臺上，叫進來的人看得見光。

en: Your eye is the lamp of your body. When your eye is healthy, your whole body is full of light, but when it is bad, your body is full of darkness.
zh: 你的眼睛就是你身體的燈，你的眼睛健全，全身就明亮；如果不健全，全身就黑暗。

en: Therefore be careful lest the light in you be darkness.
zh: 所以要謹慎，免得你裡面的光黑暗了。

en: If then your whole body is full of light, having no part dark, it will be wholly bright, as when a lamp with its rays gives you light."
zh: 你若全身明亮，沒有一點黑暗，你就完全明亮，好像明亮的燈光照你一樣。”

en: While Jesus was speaking, a Pharisee asked him to dine with him, so he went in and reclined at table.
zh: 耶穌說話的時候，有一個法利賽人請耶穌和他一起吃飯；他就進去坐席。

en: The Pharisee was astonished to see that he did not first wash before dinner.
zh: 這個法利賽人見耶穌吃飯之前不洗手，覺得奇怪。

en: And the Lord said to him, "Now you Pharisees cleanse the outside of the cup and of the dish, but inside you are full of greed and wickedness.
zh: 主對他說：“你們法利賽人把杯盤的外面洗淨，但你們裡面卻充滿了搶奪和邪惡。

en: You fools! Did not he who made the outside make the inside also?
zh: 無知的人哪，那造外面的，不也造裡面嗎？

en: But give as alms those things that are within, and behold, everything is clean for you.
zh: 只要把裡面的施捨出去，你們的一切就都潔淨了。

en: "But woe to you Pharisees! For you tithe mint and rue and every herb, and neglect justice and the love of God. These you ought to have done, without neglecting the others.
zh: 然而你們法利賽人有禍了！因為你們把薄荷、茴香和各樣菜蔬獻上十分之一，卻把公義和愛 神的事疏忽了；這些是你們應當作的，但其他的也不可疏忽。

en: Woe to you Pharisees! For you love the best seat in the synagogues and greetings in the marketplaces.
zh: 你們法利賽人有禍了！因為你們喜愛會堂裡的高位和人在巿中心的問安。

en: Woe to you! For you are like unmarked graves, and people walk over them without knowing it."
zh: 你們有禍了！因為你們好像不顯露的墳墓，走在上面的人並不知道。”

en: One of the lawyers answered him, "Teacher, in saying these things you insult us also."
zh: 律法師中有一個回答他：“老師，你這樣說，把我們也侮辱了！”

en: And he said, "Woe to you lawyers also! For you load people with burdens hard to bear, and you yourselves do not touch the burdens with one of your fingers.
zh: 耶穌說：“你們律法師也有禍了，因為你們把難擔的擔子叫人擔，自己連一個指頭也不動。

en: Woe to you! For you build the tombs of the prophets whom your fathers killed.
zh: 你們有禍了！因為你們修造先知的墳墓，而那些先知正是你們祖先所殺的，

en: So you are witnesses and you consent to the deeds of your fathers, for they killed them, and you build their tombs.
zh: 這樣，你們就成了證人，對你們祖先的作為表示同意；他們殺害先知，你們修造先知的墳墓。

en: Therefore also the Wisdom of God said, 'I will send them prophets and apostles, some of whom they will kill and persecute,'
zh: 所以， 神的智慧說：‘我要差遣先知和使徒到他們那裡去，有的他們要殺害，有的他們要迫害，

en: so that the blood of all the prophets, shed from the foundation of the world, may be charged against this generation,
zh: 為要使創世以來眾先知所流的血，從亞伯的血起，直到在祭壇和聖所之間受害的撒迦利亞的血為止，都向這一代追討。’是的，我告訴你們，都要向這一代追討。

en: from the blood of Abel to the blood of Zechariah, who perished between the altar and the sanctuary. Yes, I tell you, it will be required of this generation.
Woe to you lawyers! For you have taken away the key of knowledge. You did not enter yourselves, and you hindered those who were entering."
zh: 你們律法師有禍了！因為你們拿去知識的鑰匙，自己不進去，又阻止要進去的人。”

en: As he went away from there, the scribes and the Pharisees began to press him hard and to provoke him to speak about many things,
zh: 耶穌從那裡出來，經學家和法利賽人非常敵視他，質問他很多問題，

en: lying in wait for him, to catch him in something he might say.
zh: 等機會從他的口中找把柄。
